sections.markdown:
- Activity: Evening Run
- Started: 2025-07-03 18:57
- Distance: 3.3 km
- Moving time: 28:36
- Elapsed time: 31:14
- Elevation gain: 16 m
- Average heart rate: 117.4 bpm
- Max heart rate: 140 bpm
- Average watts: 140.3 W
- Average speed: 7 km/h
- Apple Health recorded `2` during-run heart-rate samples. Average HR was `112.7 bpm`, ranging from `107.4` to `118.0 bpm`.

- Apple Health cadence averaged `140.7 spm`, with a working range of `109.0` to `166.6 spm`.
- First-half cadence averaged `127.0 spm` and second-half cadence averaged `149.8 spm` (+22.8 spm), which suggests turnover lifted rather than falling away.

- Strava moving pace averaged `8:37 /km` across `3.317 km` in `28:36` moving time.
- Estimated first-half moving pace was `9:15 /km` and second-half pace was `7:59 /km` (-76 s/km), so pace picked up through the second half.

- Strava summary HR came in at `117.4 bpm` average and `140 bpm` max.
- Distance-split HR averaged `112.2 bpm` in the first half and `122.2 bpm` in the second (+10.0 bpm), which shows clear late cardiovascular drift.

- Moving time was `28:36` out of `31:14` elapsed (91.6%), which shows some stop-start interruption.
- The downsampled moving stream shows `19` stop segments and `15.3%` stationary samples, so the route included repeated interruptions.

- Strava logged about `33.6 m` of climbing, with altitude moving between roughly `4.2 m` and `10.2 m`.
- Estimated climbing was `18.4 m` in the first half and `15.2 m` in the second, so most of the climbing landed earlier.
